name: Voting Router
description: FastAPI router providing voting endpoints for tools. Allows authenticated users to vote for tools (marking them as useful) and remove their votes. Implements vote uniqueness constraint per user-tool pair and returns current vote counts.

types.name: VoteResponse

fields.name: vote_count
fields.description: Total count of votes for the tool

types.description: Response structure for successful vote operations

types.name: Tool
types.description: Tool model from backend.models with slug and is_active fields

types.name: ToolVote
types.description: ToolVote model from backend.models representing user votes

functions.name: vote_useful
functions.description: Records a user's vote for a tool identified by slug. Returns existing vote status if already voted, otherwise creates new vote and returns updated count. Only active tools can be voted on.

error_cases.name: tool_not_found
error_cases.condition: Tool with given slug not found OR tool.is_active != True

preconditions: user must be authenticated (enforced by get_current_user dependency)
db session must be valid and connected
postconditions: If tool not found: HTTPException raised with 404 status
If user already voted: returns {'status': 'already_voted'} without modifying database
If vote successful: ToolVote record created, database committed, returns {'status': 'voted', 'vote_count': <int>}
side_effects: Reads from Tool table (filtered by slug and is_active=True)
Reads from ToolVote table (filtered by tool_id and user_id)
Writes new ToolVote record to database if vote doesn't exist
Commits database transaction on successful vote

structured_side_effects.description: Creates new vote record if not already voted

functions.name: remove_vote
functions.description: Removes a user's vote for a tool identified by slug. Returns not_voted status if vote doesn't exist, otherwise deletes vote and returns updated count. Only active tools can have votes removed.

error_cases.name: tool_not_found
error_cases.condition: Tool with given slug not found OR tool.is_active != True

preconditions: user must be authenticated (enforced by get_current_user dependency)
db session must be valid and connected
postconditions: If tool not found: HTTPException raised with 404 status
If vote doesn't exist: returns {'status': 'not_voted'} without modifying database
If removal successful: ToolVote record deleted, database committed, returns {'status': 'removed', 'vote_count': <int>}
side_effects: Reads from Tool table (filtered by slug and is_active=True)
Reads from ToolVote table (filtered by tool_id and user_id)
Deletes ToolVote record from database if vote exists
Commits database transaction on successful removal

structured_side_effects.description: Deletes existing vote record if found

invariants: Each user can only have one vote per tool (enforced by database query check)
Only tools with is_active=True can be voted on
Vote counts reflect actual database state after commit
requires: Authenticated user context via get_current_user dependency
Active database session via get_db dependency
Tool, ToolVote, and User models must exist in backend.models

data_access.rationale: Reads Tool and ToolVote tables to check existence and uniqueness. Writes to ToolVote table to create or delete vote records.

side_effects.rationale: Queries to verify tool existence and vote uniqueness
Creates or deletes vote records and commits transactions
